progress_msg: torch.cuda.OutOfMemoryError: CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 20.00 MiB. GPU 0 has a total capacty of 44.39 GiB of which 8.94 MiB is free. Process 4703 has 392.70 MiB memory in use. Process 3444935 has 42.55 GiB memory in use. Process 3460689 has 1.39 GiB memory in use.
